subComponents.name: input/field
subComponents.description: The interactive text field. Handles all interaction states independently. Can be used standalone.

subComponents.name: input/label
subComponents.description: The label block. Includes label text, optional help icon, optional helper link, and optional description line. Can be used standalone.

subComponents.name: input/feedback-text
subComponents.description: The feedback/validation text below the field. Three types: info, error, success. Can be used standalone.

variants.name: default
variants.description: No variant — variation is controlled through props.

sizes.name: default
sizes.description: Single confirmed size. Rectangular corners (not pill).

wrapperStates.name: error
wrapperStates.description: Validation failed. Red border and red feedback text.

wrapperStates.name: succeeded
wrapperStates.figmaPropNote: Figma uses 'succeded' (one d). Documentation uses the correct spelling 'succeeded'.
wrapperStates.description: Validation passed. Green border and green feedback text.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Default
fieldInteractionStates.description: Empty, not focused. Shows placeholder text.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Focus
fieldInteractionStates.description: Focused but no input yet. Darker border. Placeholder still visible.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Typing
fieldInteractionStates.description: User is actively typing. Dark border. Value text and cursor visible.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Filled
fieldInteractionStates.description: Has a value, not focused. Default border. Value text visible.

fieldInteractionStates.name: Disabled
fieldInteractionStates.description: Not interactive. Lighter background. Muted text.

anatomyParts.name: Label
anatomyParts.description: Label block containing label text, help icon, helper link, and description.

anatomyParts.name: HelpIcon
anatomyParts.description: Question mark icon. Shown when labelHelpShow is true.

anatomyParts.name: HelperLink
anatomyParts.description: Right-aligned text link in the label row.

anatomyParts.name: Field
anatomyParts.description: The interactive input area. Height 44px, border-radius 12px.

anatomyParts.name: LeftIcon
anatomyParts.description: Contextual icon on the left side of the field.

anatomyParts.name: TextContent
anatomyParts.description: Shows placeholder, value, or value + cursor depending on state.

anatomyParts.name: RightIcon
anatomyParts.description: Contextual icon on the right side of the field.

anatomyParts.name: InlineButton
anatomyParts.description: Compact pill action button inside the field, right-aligned.

anatomyParts.name: FeedbackText
anatomyParts.description: Single-line message below the field. Color varies by type: info, error, success.

TextInput.name: type
TextInput.description: Validation state. Controls border and feedback text style.

TextInput.name: labelShow
TextInput.description: Show or hide the label block.

TextInput.name: labelHelpShow
TextInput.description: Show help icon and helper link in the label.

TextInput.name: labelDescription
TextInput.description: Show the description line in the label.

TextInput.name: message
TextInput.description: Show or hide the feedback text.

TextInput.name: leftIcon
TextInput.description: Show left icon in the field.

TextInput.name: rightIcon
TextInput.description: Show right icon in the field.

TextInput.name: button
TextInput.description: Show inline action button inside the field.

notes: The 'succeded' prop value is spelled with one 'd' in Figma. Use 'succeeded' in all documentation.
The field uses border-radius 12px (rectangular), not the pill shape used by dropdown-input and select-boolean.
Token values differ between light and dark surfaces. See text-input.tokens.json.
The phone prefix pattern in the Driver App uses input/field standalone with a dropdown chevron — this is a product-level composition, not a variant of TextInput.
